mapper.select: SELECT messageId, senderId, receiverId, content, messageType, isRead, createdTime, deletedTime FROM messages WHERE ((senderId = #{senderId} AND receiverId = #{receiverId}) OR (senderId = #{receiverId} AND receiverId = #{senderId})) AND deletedTime IS NULL ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (senderId, receiverId, content, messageType, isRead, createdTime) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{isRead}, #{createdTime})
